product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always wear protective clothing, gloves, and eye/face protection when handling. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not apply in windy conditions. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. In case of accidental contact, rinse immediately with plenty of water and seek medical advice. Do not eat, drink, or smoke while handling. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and direct sunlight. Dispose of the product and container in accordance with local regulations.
